Juliana Guevara Java — A single-origin coffee offering distinct flavor profiles.
Gitwe — A single-origin coffee known for its unique characteristics.
Irvin Izaguirre — A single-origin coffee showcasing specific regional flavors.
Day Dream — A signature coffee blend crafted for a balanced taste.
Nelson Moreno — A single-origin coffee with a unique producer story.
Bolt — A popular coffee blend, often a best-seller.
Blends Subscription — Receive a curated selection of Madcap's coffee blends regularly.
Eureka — Another distinct coffee blend from Madcap's collection.
MiiR New Standard Carafe — A high-quality carafe for serving and keeping coffee warm.
Kalita Wave 155 — A popular pour-over coffee dripper for precise brewing.
Kalita Wave 185 Glass Dripper — A glass version of the Kalita Wave dripper for aesthetic and thermal stability.
Aeropress Coffee Maker — A versatile and portable coffee maker known for its smooth, low-acid brews.
Breville Bambino Plus — A compact espresso machine designed for home baristas.
Breville Barista Touch Impress — An advanced espresso machine with intuitive touchscreen control and integrated grinding.
Breville Barista Express — A popular all-in-one espresso machine with an integrated grinder.
Breville Barista Touch — An intuitive espresso machine with a touchscreen for simplified brewing.
Stacked Logo Hoodie — A comfortable hoodie featuring the Madcap stacked logo design.
Stacked Logo Longsleeve Tee — A long-sleeve t-shirt with the Madcap stacked logo.
1041 Fulton Dickies Work Shirt — A durable work shirt featuring the address of Madcap's original location.
Stacked Logo Tee — A classic short-sleeve t-shirt with the Madcap stacked logo.
Circle Logo Tee — A short-sleeve t-shirt featuring Madcap's circular logo design.
Bolt Circle Tee — A t-shirt featuring branding related to Madcap's 'Bolt' coffee blend.
Madcap Socks — Branded socks for everyday wear.
Always-On Crew — A crewneck sweatshirt for casual comfort.
Single Origin Subscription — Receive a rotating selection of Madcap's single-origin coffees regularly.
Placebo (Decaf) — A decaffeinated coffee blend, offering flavor without the caffeine.
Fraction (Half-Caff) — A half-caffeinated coffee blend for a milder energy boost.
Cascara — Dried coffee cherry husks used to brew a unique tea-like beverage.
E Gift Cards — Digital gift cards for flexible gifting options.
Classes & Tours — Educational experiences for learning about coffee brewing, tasting, and origin.
Wholesale Program — Partnership opportunities for cafes, restaurants, and markets to serve Madcap Coffee.
secondary: STAY CONNECTED — FOR THOUGHTFUL UPDATES, NEW RELEASES, AND A CLOSER LOOK AT WHAT WE'RE BUILDING.

matches.primary: Madcap Coffee exists to reveal the craftsmanship and human connection behind every cup, transforming a daily ritual into something more intentional. Based in Michigan, we roast and serve specialty coffee in Grand Rapids and Detroit while partnering with cafes, restaurants, and markets through our wholesale program.
